title: Sunset at Oia Village
myExperiance: Oia is one of the most famous villages in Santorini, known for its stunning sunset views, narrow streets, white houses, and blue domes. I arrived about an hour before sunset and found a spot along the castle ruins. It was crowded, but absolutely worth it. As the sun dipped below the horizon, everyone went silent - it felt surreal.
valuableTips: Arrive at least 1 hour early to get a good spot. Avoid peak season if you dislike crowds. Bring water - it can get very hot. Wear comfortable shoes for walking on uneven streets.
